name: Apple Ads: Keyword Suggest
description: Fetch Apple Ads keyword suggestions (with popularity signals) from the authenticated portal's internal endpoint `/cm/api/v2/keywords/recommendation`. Uses a same-origin request inside the browser session, so auth cookies are handled by the browser — no cookie scraping, no DOM parsing. Requires the user to be signed in to app-ads.apple.com.

browser_automation.description: Navigate to an ad group page (primes auth/CSRF context), then issue a same-origin GET to the keyword recommendation endpoint and return the JSON body.

sequences.name: apple_ads_keyword_suggest
sequences.description: Prime auth on the ad group page, then call /cm/api/v2/keywords/recommendation.

required_variables.name: org_id
required_variables.description: Apple Ads organization id (from the URL path /cm/app/{org_id}/...).

required_variables.name: adgroup_id
required_variables.description: Ad group id from the URL.

required_variables.name: adam_id
required_variables.description: App adamId (App Store ID) associated with the keyword suggestion context.

required_variables.name: query
required_variables.description: Seed keyword text to request suggestions for.

steps.name: Navigate to the ad group keywords tab (ensures auth context)

help.summary: Fetch Apple Ads keyword suggestions with popularity signals for a seed keyword.

parameters.name: org_id
parameters.description: Apple Ads org id from the portal URL.

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Campaign id from the portal URL.

parameters.name: adgroup_id
parameters.description: Ad group id from the portal URL.

parameters.name: adam_id
parameters.description: App adamId (App Store ID) used as the context app for suggestions.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Seed keyword to request suggestions for.

examples.command: rzn-browser run apple-ads keyword-suggest --param org_id="123456" --param campaign_id="555000111" --param adgroup_id="777000222" --param adam_id="1232780281" --param query="notes app"
examples.description: Ask the portal for keyword recs on 'notes app' in the context of the given ad group.

help.returns: JSON body from /cm/api/v2/keywords/recommendation — typically an object with a `recommendations` array where each item has `keyword`, `matchType`, `popularity`, and bid hints. Exact shape is owned by Apple's portal API.
notes: Requires an authenticated app-ads.apple.com session in the browser.
If the request returns 401/403, the portal auth expired — open a portal tab and re-auth.
The priming navigation to ?tab=0 is what makes XSRF cookies available to the same-origin step.
Prefer this workflow over DOM scraping; the portal's keyword UI is shadow-DOM heavy and brittle.
